default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync for Jason's pod to discuss Surge and Augment projects, content strategy, and workflow improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/TfCH13u9VqTyGo8YMrWH7eTvx_Xyk7AJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Surge website nearly ready; final tweaks and SEO optimization needed](https://fathom.video/share/TfCH13u9VqTyGo8YMrWH7eTvx_Xyk7AJ?tab=summary&timestamp=203.0)
  - [Augment content strategy needs prioritization; focus on quality over quantity](https://fathom.video/share/TfCH13u9VqTyGo8YMrWH7eTvx_Xyk7AJ?tab=summary&timestamp=467.0)
  - [Workflow improvements required for content generation and editing processes](https://fathom.video/share/TfCH13u9VqTyGo8YMrWH7eTvx_Xyk7AJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1529.0)
  - [New initiatives: GrowthX engineers blog and automation reporting dashboard](https://fathom.video/share/TfCH13u9VqTyGo8YMrWH7eTvx_Xyk7AJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1157.0)

## Topics

### Surge Website Progress

  - [Website nearly complete; 9/10 requested changes implemented](https://fathom.video/share/TfCH13u9VqTyGo8YMrWH7eTvx_Xyk7AJ?tab=summary&timestamp=227.0)
  - [Some Safari-specific issues remain (jitteriness); may remove effects for Safari](https://fathom.video/share/TfCH13u9VqTyGo8YMrWH7eTvx_Xyk7AJ?tab=summary&timestamp=245.0)
  - [SEO basics in place (meta descriptions, titles, tags); sitemap to be added](https://fathom.video/share/TfCH13u9VqTyGo8YMrWH7eTvx_Xyk7AJ?tab=summary&timestamp=316.0)
  - [Checklist of completed items to be created for transparency](https://fathom.video/share/TfCH13u9VqTyGo8YMrWH7eTvx_Xyk7AJ?tab=summary&timestamp=410.0)

### Augment Content Strategy
